name: logistics-projects-scaffold
description: Applied logistics project scaffold: container packing, customs tariff, trade law learning, yard simulation, freight audit, warehouse picking, cold-chain monitoring, and demand planning.

scripts.test: npm --prefix container-packing-pro test && npm --prefix vn-customs-toolkit test && npm --prefix logistics-law-hub test && npm --prefix yard-simulator test && npm --prefix freight-cost-auditor test && npm --prefix warehouse-picking-optimizer test && npm --prefix cold-chain-monitor test && npm --prefix demand-planning-lite test
